contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Drafted an internal future-direction proposal for blockchain-anchoring the DAO's audit trail: shipped as TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#38 — BLOCKCHAIN_ANCHORING_PROPOSAL.md. Captures the design thinking for hashing-not-bodies on-chain anchors of cache.json snapshots (treasury-cache, dao_members.json, freight_lanes.json, currency-compositions), Merkle-root batching for Telegram Chat Logs (privacy-safe since only roots are anchored, not sensitive row contents), and a two-tier TrueChain-plus-public-chain approach (continuous low-cost writes on TrueChain, periodic tip-hash anchors into a public chain for audiences that do not trust DAO operators). Explicit audience framing (real value is external verifiability for regulators / partners / governance challengers — not internal integrity which is already strong via RSA-signed events + git history + existing TrueChain mirror). Scope discipline for the first prototype (one cache, one Telegram batch, TrueChain only; defer public anchors + multi-source Merkle trees). Promotion criteria documented for when this moves out of agentic_ai_context and into the main truesight_me whitepaper (30 days anchored, end-to-end independently verified, a public-chain tip anchor has landed, runnable verification script without DAO credentials). Paired with Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: N/A
- Attached Filename: None
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
